nasb.text: Also on your skirts is found The lifeblood of the innocent poor; You did not find them breaking in. But in spite of all these things,

esv.text: Also on your skirts is found the lifeblood of the guiltless poor; you did not find them breaking in. Yet in spite of all these things

cnv.text: 在你衣襟上又發現無辜窮人的血， 並且你不是發現他們在挖窟窿時殺他們的。 雖然這樣，

ccb.text: 你们的衣服沾满无辜穷人的血， 他们并没有进你们的家偷窃。
